title: Torna Fort
tagline: Torna Fort — heritage city of Maharashtra

overview.short: Torna Fort, also known as Prachandagad, is a large fort located in Pune district, in the Indian state of Maharashtra.
overview.description: Torna Fort, also known as Prachandagad, is a large fort located in Pune district, in the Indian state of Maharashtra. It is historically significant because it was the first fort captured by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj in 1646, at the age of 16. The hill has an elevation of 1,403 metres (4,603 ft) above sea level, making it the highest hill-fort in the district. The name derives from Prachanda (Marathi for huge or massive) and gad (Marathi for fort).

topPlaces.name: Gunjwani Dam
topPlaces.description: Gunjwane Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Kanandi river near Velhe, Pune district in state of Maharashtra in India.

topPlaces.name: Rajgad
topPlaces.description: Rajgad (literal meaning ruling fort) is a Hill region fort situated in the Pune district of Maharashtra, India. Formerly known as Murumbdev, the fort was the first capital of the Maratha Empire under the rule of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj for almost 26 years, after which the capital was moved to the Raigad Fort.

items.note: Gunjwane Dam, is an earthfill and gravity dam on Kanandi river near Velhe, Pune district in state of Maharashtra in India.

Rajgad (literal meaning ruling fort) is a Hill region fort situated in the Pune district of Maharashtra, India. Formerly known as Murumbdev, the fort was the first capital of the Maratha Empire under the rule of Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj for almost 26 years, after which the capital was moved to the Raigad Fort.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Torna Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Torna Fort is Mar – Jun, Sep – Nov. Summers are 15–28°C and winters are 2–16°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Torna Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Pune Airport (46 km) and the nearest railway station is Pune Junction (39 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Torna Fort?
faq.a: 2 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Torna Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Torna Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Torna Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Torna Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Gunjwani Dam, Rajgad.
